fall_of_constanplea.title: The Fall of Constanplea
fall_of_constanplea.author: Scholar Theophanes of Byzantra
fall_of_constanplea.description: A firsthand account of the final siege and fall of Constanplea, written by a survivor of the Osman conquest.

origins_of_the_osmans.title: Origins of the Osman People
origins_of_the_osmans.author: Archivist Demetrios Palaiologos
origins_of_the_osmans.description: A scholarly history of the Osman people — from nomadic clans on the steppes north of Yixuan to the rulers of a world empire.

new_order_of_kostantora.title: The New Order: Life in Kostantora
new_order_of_kostantora.author: Miriam of the Lower City
new_order_of_kostantora.description: A personal account of life in Kostantora fifteen years after the conquest — the slave markets, religious imposition, and daily survival.

chronicles_of_byzantra.title: Chronicles of Byzantra
chronicles_of_byzantra.author: The Byzantra Academy of History
chronicles_of_byzantra.description: A concise history of the Byzantra Empire, from the first Basileus Konrad the Unifier to the fall of Basileus Konstantinos IX.

osman_faith_and_law.title: The Faith and Law of the Osmanoğlu Empire
osman_faith_and_law.author: Imperial Office of Trade and Foreign Relations
osman_faith_and_law.description: An official Osman guide for foreign visitors — customs, laws, and strongly-worded advice on not discussing the city's prior history.
